steps.title: Identify the pricing structure
steps.content:
The problem describes two price components:
  • First book: \$15
  • Each additional book: \$12

steps.title: Express the number of additional books
steps.content: If $x$ books are purchased in total, then $(x-1)$ books are purchased after the first. The cost for these $(x-1)$ additional books is: $$12(x-1)$$

steps.title: Write the total cost equation
steps.content: The total cost is the cost of the additional books plus the cost of the first book: $$y = 12(x-1) + 15$$ C is correct.
